items.name: rusty key
items.description: An old rusty key covered with dust.

items.name: torch
items.description: A wooden torch that can light up dark places.

items.name: ancient coin
items.description: A mysterious coin from an ancient civilization.

rooms.name: Cave Entrance
rooms.description: You stand at the mouth of a dark, damp cave. A chill wind blows from within. Sunlight barely reaches this place.

rooms.name: Dark Tunnel
rooms.description: The tunnel is cold and almost completely dark. Water drips from the ceiling, and strange echoes surround you.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.description: A beautiful underground lake stretches before you. The water is crystal clear, and faint blue light reflects from glowing crystals.
